description: NULLIF always produces a nullable result because it can return NULL when arguments match

columns.name: active_status
columns.note: NULLIF returns NULL when the two arguments are equal

name: nullif_always_nullable
query_sql:
-- @name GetActiveStatus
-- @returns :many
SELECT NULLIF(status, 'inactive') AS active_status FROM users
schema_sql: CREATE TABLE users (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL, email TEXT NOT NULL, bio TEXT, age INTEGER, score NUMERIC, status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active', created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now())
